log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
--- Hexblood — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Hexblood — Unarmored Caster.
→ Hexblood — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 20] FAIL! 34 necrotic damage. HP: 33/67
--- Hexblood — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:6+9=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
=== ROUND 3 ===
Lich is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Lich WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
--- Hexblood — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:17+9=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Hexblood — Unarmored Caster.
→ Hexblood — Unarmored Caster healed for 8 HP. HP: 41/67
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Hexblood — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 32 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Hexblood — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Hexblood — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Hexblood — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 24 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 12] MAINTAINED!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
